display_text: Blink Dagger, Cost: 2250: Instantly teleports your hero up to 1200 units to a targeted point. Cannot be used for 3 seconds after taking damage from an enemy hero or Roshan. Essential initiation and repositioning tool for gap-closing and escape. Stats: CD: 15s, Range: 1200, Damage Disable: 3s.

display_text: Blink Dagger, Cost: 2250: Provides no attribute bonuses or stats. Pure utility item whose value comes entirely from its powerful, low-cooldown active mobility spell.

display_text: Blink Dagger, Cost: 2250: Core initiation tool enabling heroes to instantly close large distances to start fights, land critical abilities, or catch key targets. Essential for heroes with high-impact, short-range spells who lack innate mobility.
search_text: blink initiation, start fights, team fight starter, catch tool, surprise engage, initiation mobility, gap closer, fight opener, target access, lockdown setup, Blink Dagger

display_text: Blink Dagger, Cost: 2250: Provides critical mobility to escape dangerous situations by blinking over terrain or to allies. The 3-second cooldown after taking hero damage requires careful positioning and timing, making it a high-skill defensive item as well.
search_text: blink escape, defensive blink, terrain escape, dodge ability, reposition escape, survival tool, defensive mobility, blink out, escape initiation, Blink Dagger

display_text: Blink Dagger, Cost: 2250: Essential first or second major item for initiators like Axe, Earthshaker, or Magnus to enable their AoE ultimates. Also a key positioning tool for supports and carries who need to avoid being kited or to secure kills. Timing is critical, as its power spike is immediate upon purchase.
search_text: blink initiator item, blink core item, melee initiator, blink axe, blink earthshaker, blink magnus, positioning support, aggressive positioning, core timing, power spike, Blink Dagger
